title: Currency
content:
One of the cows was Belladonna,
        another Nightshade
        still a third, Witch's Butter - 
        the farmer in question responded with
        an eel in tow that resembled a hoe
        & a Raggedy-Ann calf
        with an elixir for a tail
        & a spendthrift tongue
        spreading its way
        thru the emptied grass.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Paul Cameron Brown delivers a powerful performance in "Currency"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
